title: Strong Large-Cap Insider Buys: Q2 2023
text: After bringing you the second quarter installment covering mid-cap corporate insider activity, today's piece article will cover on the latest insider activity within the large-cap stock range. Insiders at Enphase Energy, Axon Enterprise, ONEOK, Inc., U.S. Bancorp, and Tyson Foods have shown unusual interest in their own companies' stocks, buying large amounts in the second quarter. Other notable insider purchases include the Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund's $1.84 billion purchase of Lucid Group and Berkshire Hathaway's doubling down on Occidental Petroleum.

title: Axon to Release Second Quarter 2023 Earnings on August 8, 2023
text: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. , July 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Axon (Nasdaq: AXON), the global public safety technology leader, today announced that it will report second quarter 2023 financial results after the market closes on Tuesday, August 8, 2023.
